sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n16427" key="a)ssida/rios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀσσιδάριος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> <sense id="n16427.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">essedarius,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0553.tlg001:2:32" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Artem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.32</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
